title: docs: update README — 2026-07-17
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: News, freshly pollinated
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News patch got its daily watering. The front door now points visitors at the newest things growing in the hive.
gist.summary: Refreshed the root README's Latest News section for 2026-07-17 so repository visitors see current pollinations.ai updates.
gist.impact: People discovering the project through GitHub now get a more current snapshot of recent pollinations.ai news.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy open-source garden noticeboard represents the README's refreshed Latest News section. Polly, wearing a tiny librarian cap, pins a fresh lime-green news card onto a retro terminal-shaped bulletin board amid flowers and code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny librarian cap, pinning a fresh news card to a retro terminal bulletin board labeled 'LATEST NEWS'; code-plants and small flowers grow around it. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
